text:
Hi,
Hi Committer!

I'll fix problem.

Regards.




> ----- Original Message -----
> From: "Boris Samorodov" <bsam@ipt.ru>
> To: "M. Araujo" <araujo@bsdmail.org>
> Subject: Re: ports/103838: New port: www/asterisk-fop
> Date: Sat, 30 Sep 2006 20:47:17 +0400
>
>
> On Sat, 30 Sep 2006 11:27:17 -0300 M. Araujo wrote:
>
> > portlint running, I fixed some problems in the new port.
>
> Great, thanks!
>
> If there are no errors, I'll commit the PR. But please next time send
> your patches as attachment -- many user agents (email programs)
> redefine tabs etc. I had to edit your patch.
>
>
> WBR
